narrative:
Newark 3-C (precinct in Licking County) has 980 registered voters, with 61.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
